zh.Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England: 英國爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德
zh.Pulford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾普爾福德
英國英格蘭爾普爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Pulford於1322年出生在英國英格蘭爾普爾福德時，他的父親Robert de Pulford28歲，母親Catherine Dutton22歲。他於1345年與Jane de Pulford在英國爾普爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國爾普爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Pulford于1322年出生在英国英格兰爾普爾福德时，他的父亲Robert de Pulford28岁，母亲Catherine Dutton22岁。他于1345年与Jane de Pulford在英国爾普爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国爾普爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Pulford in Cheshire, so called from Old English pōl ‘pool, pond’ or perhaps pull ‘pool, creek’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Pulford was born in 1322, in Pulford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Pulford, was 28 and his mother, Catherine Dutton, was 22. He married Jane de Pulford in 1345, in Pulford, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1409, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Pulford, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Pulford est né en 1322, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Pulford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine Dutton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Pulford en 1345, à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1409, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Pulford, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Pulford 1322 in Pulford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Pulford 28 und seine Mutter Catherine Dutton 22. Er hat 1345 in Pulford, Cheshire, England Jane de Pulford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1409 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pulford, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Pulford è nato il nel 1322 nel Pulford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Pulford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Dutton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Pulford nel 1345, nel Pulford, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1409, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Pulford, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Pulfordが1322年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Pulfordは28歳，母Catherine Duttonは22歳であった。1345年にイギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードでJane de Pulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1409年に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプウルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Pulford(이)가 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 풀퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Pulford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Dutton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1345년 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에서 Jane de Pulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 풀퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Pulford nasceu em 1322, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Pulford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Dutton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Pulford em 1345, em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1409, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Pulford родился в 1322 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Pulford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Dutton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Pulford в 1345 г. в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1409 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности пулфорд, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Pulford nació en 1322, en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Pulford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine Dutton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jane de Pulford en 1345, en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1409, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Pulford, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
